title: Experiment Contract: FA4 B200 Combined Occupancy/TMA-L2/Precision Predictor
summary: Fixed run contract for testing the selected Flash Attention 4 B200 runtime-model hypothesis.

sections.research_question: Does adding tile-size-dependent occupancy, effective HBM/L2/TMA bandwidth, and precision-specific Tensor Core MMA/MUFU throughput to the accepted FA4 paper roofline baseline reduce held-out MAPE of predicted_runtime_ms on B200?
sections.null_hypothesis: The combined predictor does not beat the FA4 paper roofline baseline by at least 5 percentage points MAPE on the held-out validation set.
sections.alternative_hypothesis: The combined predictor reduces held-out MAPE by at least 5 percentage points and meets the useful-improvement threshold.
sections.research_type: white-box analytical model calibration and validation
sections.observation_that_answers: Held-out validation MAPE of the combined model is <= 25%, >= 75% of configs are within 30% abs error, bottleneck-label accuracy >= 75%, and delta MAPE vs baseline >= 5 percentage points improvement.
sections.dataset: Synthetic FA4 configuration matrix: batch, heads, seqlen, head_dim, causal, precision.
sections.split: 20% calibration, 20% held-out validation, 60% query; deterministic split with seed 20260704.
sections.evaluator_assumptions: White-box predictors estimate runtime from algorithm quantities and hardware throughput. Ground truth is produced by a documented white-box emulator with hidden B200 efficiency factors and 3% residual noise.
sections.stop_condition: Combined model meets all success criteria on held-out validation set.
sections.abandonment_condition: After two calibration rounds the combined model fails to beat baseline MAPE by >= 5 percentage points or fails the useful-improvement threshold.
sections.compute_budget: Single CPU run; emulator-based ground truth. Real B200 kernel execution was infeasible within the time budget.
sections.strongest_alternative_hypothesis: The TMA/L2 effective-bandwidth correction alone captures most of the improvement, and occupancy/precision terms add little.
sections.route_linkage: Proceeds from decision_record-IDEA_ROUTE_DECISION-67d409112cbb; on success routes to isomer-deepsci-analysis.
